measurement: HR=0 shotgun per-band magnitude M(B) = landing(B) x bracket(B), measured via damage-counter reconciliation on an HR-clean, ATK-clean solo SG unit (pre-registered corroboration read for the isabel SG-landing hypothesis; MEASUREMENT ONLY, no verdicts)
focusReason: solo recording - Brid: Silent Track is the only unit (all other slots EMPTY SLOT on the end screen), therefore the focus; lone Burst II => ZERO full bursts (verified: no FULL BURST splash anywhere in the 1-frame/8s segment map), S1 (full-burst-entry gated) never fires, S2 part 1 (Wind-code-only Damage Taken) inert vs the neutral boss, burst never cast. Counter events = shots + S2-part-2 riders ONLY (verified: every one of the 258 detected events classifies exactly as one or the other, zero residual)

params.atkNote: PRIMARY M uses the pre-registered term 98227 (staticAtk 98367 - bossDEF 140) => perShotUnit 197927, per plan Q-B1 (measured deviation +1.63% is under the 2% re-anchor threshold, so NO re-anchor). See qB1 for the measured term.
params.unitFormula: 98227 * 2.015 = 197927 (10-pellet shot total, non-crit non-core, no range)
params.bossElement: neutral (Armstrong, no advantage; Brid: Silent Track is Fire, no element bonus)

qB1.question: pre-registered AUX check: pin the ATK term from the early-window quantization step (a sanity frame had shown white pellet popups ~20115 vs predicted 19793, +1.6%)
qB1.outcome: CONFIRMED at the counter level, with high precision: every one of the 215 shot deltas is an exact multiple of a per-pellet step of 20,114.75 (0.5-unit grid in mid/far/midfar; 1.3-landed + 0.5-unit surplus grid in the near bands). Step-implied ATK term = 20114.75*10/2.015 = 99,825.6 vs pre-reg 98,227 = +1.627%. INDEPENDENT second read: the measured rider fixed value 673,819 / 6.75 = 99,824.3 (+1.626%) - same factor from a different mechanic. Under the measured term the rider coefficient is 673819/99825.6 = 6.7500, i.e. the stated 675% EXACTLY (the isabel-style +2.3% coef anomaly does NOT appear here; the whole +1.63% is in the ATK term).
qB1.reAnchorRule: plan threshold >2% not met => primary M kept on the 98227 basis; M_meas (measured-step basis) reported per band as the auxiliary column. All M_pre values carry the +1.63% multiplicatively; M_meas is the term-clean intrinsic value.
qB1.flag: the step-implied staticAtk would be ~99,966 vs scope-lock 98,367 (+1.63%) - same direction/size as the popup sanity read; cause not determined here (measurement only)

clock.method: top-right 03:00 countdown read by digit-template decode at 176 sampled frames (1/s) + first-damage anchor from the counter trace. CRITICAL FINDING: the countdown runs FASTER than video time by a uniform 2.07% - linear fit fightClockTimer = 0.017012*frame - 7.140 (i.e. one game-second = 58.78 video frames at 60fps; residuals within +/-0.5s quantization over all 176 reads; countdown hits 0 at frame ~11000 = video 183.3s, end-screen transition begins frame 11043). The video is 60fps CFR (12638 frames, dup=12 from VFR source).

timerAnchors.countdown: 00:24 (fit-corrected read; two raw last-digit misreads at 107s/156s traced to one mislabeled template and corrected)

clock.primaryBandClock: GAME seconds from first damage: fightClockGame = (frame - 458) * 0.017012. Chosen because the countdown (game time) is what reaches 180 at fight end and the boss-script transition pauses corroborate it (see transitionPauses). The naive video-second clock (isabel convention, fightClockVideo = (frame-458)/60) is reported as a full variant - it differs by up to -3.6s at the fight end.
clock.isabelConventionCaveat: the isabel read used fightClock ~= videoSec - 7 with a single timer anchor; if HER video had the same recorder-vs-game drift it was not measured there. Like-for-like comparison of late bands (midfar/near2) carries that caveat; the video-clock variant here brackets it.

method.primary: counter-reconciliation (SG gold standard, isabel pipeline replicated). Per-frame diff of the top-centre DAMAGE counter ROI (x1130-1490, y42-102 landscape) at 60fps over all 12,638 frames -> 288 stable plateaus -> counter VALUE read at every plateau by deslanted digit-template matching (33 glyph clusters hand-labeled from a montage; comma-ligature reads repaired by digit-strip + monotonic-bracket) -> 258 damage events with exact integer deltas. Values strictly monotonic, start 0, end exactly 74,592,500.
method.eventDetection: adaptive-threshold binarization (>=max(115, 0.78*p99) per frame, robust to red boss-flash dimming), XOR-diff > 60px = change; plateaus >= 2 frames. Counter updates are instantaneous (no roll animation): median plateau length 40 frames = exactly the 0.667s pull cadence.
method.shotCount: 215 landing shots + 43 riders = 258 events. Shot spacing rock-steady 40f (0.667s, 1.5 pulls/s); reload gap 113f = 1.883s x21 (one 114f); magazine exactly 9 everywhere once boss-downtime opportunistic reloads are accounted (see transitionPauses). ZERO whiff pulls all fight - PROVEN by the rider schedule: all 43 riders fire exactly with landing shots 5,10,...,215 (pulls = landing shots).
method.riderSeparation: the S2 rider is a SEPARATE counter event +6 frames (0.1s) after its triggering 5th shot in all 43 cases - the pre-registered same-frame-fusion concern did NOT materialize; zero fused deltas, zero shot-merges (no 450-600k deltas at all; every >=600k delta equals one of the two fixed rider values to the digit).
method.bandVerification: boss apparent size/position at band mid-windows: near1/near2 boss large-centred (near2 very large), mid medium and off to the RIGHT, midfar intermediate, far smallest/most distant + RELOADING glimpses. Ordering matches labels. The tail window (fc 176-180) shows the boss STILL LARGE at fc_game 176.9 - see anomalies.
method.pelletDecomposition: every shot delta is exactly step*(u) with u on: mid/far/midfar the 0.5-unit grid (pellet = 1.0 plain / 1.5 crit / 2.0 core / +range none); near bands the grid u = 1.3*L + 0.5*c + 1.0*k (L = landed pellets, range bonus +0.3 ADDITIVE per pellet; crit +0.5; core +1.0). The fractional digit of u uniquely determines L (landed-pellet count) for every near shot - all 84 near/tail shots decompose uniquely, zero ambiguity. Popup values confirm: plain 20115, crit 30172 (=1.5x), plain+range 26149 (=1.3x), crit+range 36207 (=1.8x = 1+0.5+0.3 additive).

riderFinding.skill: S2 part 2 - after 5 normal attacks, deals 675% of final ATK as damage to 1 enemy with lowest HP (= the boss, solo). Skill damage: no core, no range/landing, crits normally
riderFinding.trigger: SHOT-TRIGGERED, every 5th pull EXACTLY (pulls counted = landing shots; zero whiffs this fight). Fires as its own counter event +6 frames after the 5th shot, 43/43 on schedule
riderFinding.impliedCoef: 673819 / 98227 = 686.0% vs stated 675% (+1.63%) - but EXACTLY 675.00% of the measured ATK term 99825.6; the deviation is the ATK term, not the coefficient
riderFinding.popupConfirmation: a white 673,819 popup is directly visible on the far_7.5u spot-check frame (video 79.7s) - independent visual confirmation of the fixed value

bands.bossDistance: medium, boss off to the RIGHT (matches isabel's mid description)
bands.confidence: high on the value, medium on band purity
bands.confidenceNote: boundary-stable (0.981-0.988 across all clock/shift variants); window includes the fight-opening region; all 41 deltas on the exact 0.5-unit grid (no range bonus)

bands.confidence: high on the measurement, with the near-control caveat
bands.confidenceNote: sits 4.4% BELOW the 1.281 near control (measured-term basis: -6.0%). The per-shot decomposition pins the cause as LANDING: mean 8.52/10 pellets landed (unique decomposition, all 44 shots), surplus/landed 0.113 vs 0.075 crit expectation (+0.038 core-ish residual, cf isabel near1 +0.054). See wholePictureChecks.nearAgreement

bands.bossDistance: distant (smallest apparent boss of the fight; RELOADING banner visible in one spot-check)
bands.confidenceNote: all 45 deltas on the exact 0.5-unit grid; many few-pellet shots (down to 4-landed, 100,574); R6 popup spot-checks on 5 far shots agree with the delta decomposition exactly; envelope 0.698-0.720 across term-basis/boundary/clock variants

boundary-stable on the game clock (0.864-0.866) but clock-basis-sensitive (video clock 0.885); NOTE the far->midfar transition pause was observed at fc_game 108.2-110.3 (script 106) - the 2 shots at fc 107.5/108.2 are midfar-assigned but would be far under a transition-at-pause reading (moves midfar M by <1%)

bands.bossDistance: very close (largest apparent boss of the fight, centred)
bands.confidence: high on the measurement, with the near-control caveat
bands.confidenceNote: sits 7.3% ABOVE the 1.281 near control. Decomposition: mean 9.41/10 landed (23 of 37 shots landed all 10), surplus/landed 0.138 (+0.063 over crit expectation, cf isabel near2 +0.082). near1->near2 M spread is landing-count-driven (8.52 -> 9.41 = +10.4%), boss visibly closer in near2

tailExcluded.note: excluded from the fit per plan, included in total closure. FLAG: all 3 tail shots are 10-landed WITH the near range bonus (26149-grid, u=13.0/14.5/15.0) at fc_game 176.4-177.7, and the boss is still visually LARGE - the scripted 176s near->midfar transition had not landed by 177.7 on the game clock. Firing stops after the shot at fc 177.7 + rider (fc 177.8): the final ~2.3 game-seconds are a firing pause (boss untargetable / fight-end transition; 3 pull slots missing)

transitionPauses.description: four in-fight firing pauses (no counter events, no ammo spent, magazine refilled opportunistically during boss downtime - magazine arithmetic closes at exactly 9 everywhere only under this reading) + the fight-end pause. Pause = last-event -> first-event video frames, mapped to fightClockGame

pauses.match: LATE by ~2.2s (106 falls inside the regular reload 6665-6778; the pause itself starts fc 108.2)

transitionPauses.note: on the VIDEO clock the same pauses sit at 31.5-33.7 / 67.2-69.3 / 106.0-108.1 / 141.6-143.9 / 174.2-end; neither clock makes all five land exactly on the script; the game clock matches 3 of 5 within ~1s

totalClosure.note: EXACT to the digit (258 events; counter monotonic 0 -> 74,592,500; every value read from digit templates)

nearAgreement.note: FAILS the <4% gate as specified. HOWEVER the per-shot landed-pellet decomposition (unique for all 81 near shots) measures the cause: near1 mean landed 8.52/10 vs near2 9.41/10 (+10.4%), matching the M spread; surplus-per-landed-pellet is consistent across both windows (0.113 vs 0.138, both modestly above the 0.075 crit expectation, same sign/size as isabel's near core residuals). The shot-weighted pooled near M = 1.2928 is +0.9% from the 1.281 control. Interpretation (landing-variance-within-near vs basis error) is left to the judge per the pre-registration

shotCountClosure.note: 215 landing shots; ZERO whiffs proven by the rider schedule (43 riders exactly on shots 5,10,...,215). The pre-reg 195-210 band used a 7.85s cycle; the OBSERVED deterministic cycle is 8x40f + 113f = 433f = 7.22s (the pre-reg arithmetic double-counted one inter-shot gap), which predicts 214-218 over the observed firing span minus pauses - closes exactly. Inter-event gap ledger: 188x40f + 20x113f + 114f + {129,121,124,137,41}f = 10,446f = frames 458->10,904 EXACT

perBandShotCountClosure.note: R1: per-band landing-shot counts equal the pull-grid arithmetic exactly in every band (zero whiffs anywhere, so there is NO whiff story in any band - the far/midfar deficits are pellets-per-landing-shot, not missing shots): mid 41, near1 44, far 45, midfar 45, near2 37, tail 3; per-band rates 1.16-1.25 shots/s bracketing the 1.21/s cycle average, differences fully explained by reload/pause placement

quantizationCheck.note: all 215 shot deltas sit exactly on the measured pellet grid (step 20,114.75): mid/far/midfar 100% on the 0.5-unit grid; near/tail 100% on the 1.3L+0.5c grid with unique L decomposition. Both rider values are exact constants. No unexplained delta anywhere in the fight

r6PopupSpotChecks.requirement: ~5 far-band shots: white per-pellet popups counted on frames vs counter-delta-implied pellet count

checks.popups: 1x orange 30172 + ~5-6 white 20115 + the rider's own white 673819
checks.agreement: consistent; rider fixed value visually confirmed
EXACT - direct visual proof of 10/10 landing and the 1.3x pellet

r6PopupSpotChecks.coreObservation: zero red CORE HIT popups in any sampled frame; no counter delta requires a core pellet (near surpluses are expressible as crit counts, though 0.5x2-vs-1.0 aliasing means an occasional core cannot be excluded)
r6PopupSpotChecks.rangeBonusFinding: near-band pellet values are 26,149 (plain) / 36,207 (crit) = step x 1.3 / x 1.8: the +0.3 range bonus is ADDITIVE with the +0.5 crit bonus per pellet (not multiplicative 1.3*1.5 = 1.95x = 39,224, which is NOT observed)

anomalies: COUNTDOWN-VS-VIDEO DRIFT: the game clock runs a uniform 2.07% fast vs the 60fps recording (176 timer reads, linear to +/-0.5s). Band windows are clock-basis-sensitive at the far end (up to 3.6s); both clock variants reported per band. If the isabel video shares this recorder behavior, her late-band windows carry the same (unmeasured) shift

ATK TERM +1.63%: measured per-pellet step 20,114.75 and rider value 673,819 both imply an ATK term of ~99,825 vs the scope-lock 98,227 (under it, the rider coefficient is exactly 675%). Below the 2% re-anchor threshold; primary M carries it multiplicatively

NEAR CONTROL SPREAD: near1 1.2241 (-4.4%) vs near2 1.3744 (+7.3%) - the <4% gate fails; measured cause is landed-pellet count (8.52 vs 9.41 of 10), boss visibly closer in near2; pooled near = 1.2928 (+0.9% vs control)

TRANSITION TIMING: the observed far->midfar untargetable pause is ~2.2s late vs the script (fc 108.2 vs 106) and the final near->midfar transition ~1.8s late (fc ~177.8 vs 176); the other three transitions match within ~1s. The 3 tail shots (fc 176.4-177.7) still carry the near range bonus
NO FUSION: the pre-registered rider fusion concern did not materialize - the rider is always a separate event +6f after its triggering shot; no delta >=450k other than the two exact rider constants

preRegComparison.note: NO verdict, NO H0/H1 classification here per the task spec - the blind panel judges against the pre-registration. Data note only: per-band M and the crit-expectation-normalized landed counts (mid 9.01, far 6.49, midfar 7.93 of 10, core-0 assumption) are provided for the pooling step

eventLog: events.json (same directory): all 258 events with {frame, videoSec, fightClockGame, fightClockVideo, counterValue, delta, classification shot|rider|rider-crit, units, shotIndex, band, bandVideoClock}
note: MEASUREMENT ONLY - no engine/override edits, no verdicts. M(B) on the pre-reg 197,927 basis is the primary deliverable; M on the measured-term basis, per-shot pellet decompositions, dual-clock band variants, and boundary sensitivity are the pre-registered auxiliary columns (R1, R4, R5, R6, Q-B1 all reported).
